raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is on top of and attached to box_1, so lifting box_1 directly would be obstructed; the left arm can reach the top surface of box_2 without colliding with the table or box edges.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is constrained from above to prevent shifting while separating the attachment between the boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is stabilized by the left arm; there is free lateral space on the tabletop around the boxes to allow a controlled shear force to break/release the attachment without tipping box_2 onto the table.",
    "Postcondition": "The attachment between box_2 and box_1 is released (boxes are no longer attached), with box_2 remaining on top of or immediately adjacent to box_1 in a stable configuration."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The boxes are no longer attached; the left arm is still in contact and can guide box_2 to a stable resting spot on the tabletop without interfering with box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is set down on the table in a nearby clear area (e.g., to the right of box_1), leaving clearance to access box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is unobstructed (box_2 is no longer on top/attached); there is sufficient space on both left and right sides of box_1 for both end-effectors to clamp/support the 30x30x30 cm box (too large for claw grasp).",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (the darker box) is securely held off the tabletop with bilateral support, ready to be carried or further positioned as needed."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is on top of and attached to box_1, so lifting box_1 directly would be obstructed; the left arm can reach the top surface of box_2 without colliding with the table or box edges.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is constrained from above to prevent shifting while separating the attachment between the boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is stabilized by the left arm; there is free lateral space on the tabletop around the boxes to allow a controlled shear force to break/release the attachment without tipping box_2 onto the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The attachment between box_2 and box_1 is released (boxes are no longer attached), with box_2 remaining on top of or immediately adjacent to box_1 in a stable configuration.

parsed_json.Precondition: The boxes are no longer attached; the left arm is still in contact and can guide box_2 to a stable resting spot on the tabletop without interfering with box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is set down on the table in a nearby clear area (e.g., to the right of box_1), leaving clearance to access box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is unobstructed (box_2 is no longer on top/attached); there is sufficient space on both left and right sides of box_1 for both end-effectors to clamp/support the 30x30x30 cm box (too large for claw grasp).
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (the darker box) is securely held off the tabletop with bilateral support, ready to be carried or further positioned as needed.
